reviews.comment:
A un poco más de 150 km de BB. Acá se paga el combustible a precio patagónico (un 30% menos aprox.)
Siempre hay cola para cargar, así que aprovecha a estirar las piernas para seguir viaje.
Baños limpios.
Precios bien en el shop
En febrero 2022 pagamos a la ida y a la vuelta con la app YPF y ningún problema.

(Translated by Google)
Just over 150 km from BB. Here you pay Patagonian prices for fuel (about 30% less). There's always a line to fill up, so take advantage of the opportunity to stretch your legs before continuing your journey.
Clean restrooms.
Good prices at the convenience store.
In February 2022, we paid both ways with the YPF app and had no problems.

reviews.comment:
La estacion de servicio es como todas salvo q tiene un hotel alojamiento pocos metros adelante. Lo q me ha pasado es q la estacion no tenga nafta (pero tranquilos eran las 5:30am, de dia siempre hay)

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is like all the others, except there's a hotel just a few meters ahead. What happened to me was that the station didn't have any gas (but don't worry, it was 5:30 a.m.; there's always gas during the day).
